title: astragalus monumentalis var. cottamii
intro: Astragalus monumentalis var. cottamii, also known as Cottam's milkvetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and enhance its natural defenses. The health benefits of Astragalus monumentalis var. cottamii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting energy levels. Herbal preparations of Cottam's milkvetch include dried roots and rhizomes, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or infusions to support overall well-being.
